name: team field with matchup_opponent_type param
description: Test case for team field with matchup_opponent_type param
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE'), "t3af59e5bb75bc020a27e092f34a2cd45" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "team", count(distinct "nfl_plays"."esbid") as "rate_type_total_count" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."pos_team" as "team_code", SUM(pass_yds) AS m_8ccc10433265 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by nfl_plays.pos_team), "t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544" as (select "year", "week", v as nfl_team, h as game_opponent, true as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2025_REG_WEEK_1') and h IN ('WAS', 'ARI', 'LAR') union select "year", "week", h as nfl_team, v as game_opponent, false as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2025_REG_WEEK_1') and v IN ('WAS', 'ARI', 'LAR')) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d.m_8ccc10433265) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3af59e5bb75bc020a27e092f34a2cd45.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "t3af59e5bb75bc020a27e092f34a2cd45" on "t3af59e5bb75bc020a27e092f34a2cd45"."team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" left join "rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d" on "rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d"."team_code" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" inner join "t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544" on "t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
